subcodes.first_line: Every name beareth witness that He is sanctified above all names, and every thing testifieth that He, verily, is the Most High, the Most Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد کل اسم بانه مقدس عن الاسماء کلها و کل شیء علی انه لهو العلی العظیم انه
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
